message:
feat(plan): add obligation flow analysis over Plan IR (bd-vve1, bd-39zb)

- Add ObligationFlow struct tracking reserves/must_resolve/leak_on_cancel
- Leaf annotation convention: labels starting "obl:" are tracked
- Join/Race/Timeout semantics for obligation propagation
- diagnostics() method for reporting obligation issues
- 23 tests for analysis module (all passing)

Closes bd-vve1, bd-39zb

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
